name: ui_hands
description: Allows the assistant to reach into applications to click buttons, type text, and execute shortcuts.

actions.name: ui_click
actions.description: Clicks a UI element by name or coordinates (e.g., 'Reply' or '100,200').

actions.name: ui_type
actions.description: Types text into the active field or a specific window. Format: 'WindowName|Text' or just 'Text'.
